keyTerms.ribbed vault: A medieval roofing technique that concentrates weight onto specific points, freeing walls to become windows
keyTerms.flying buttress: An external arched support that carries lateral thrust from high stone vaults down to the ground
keyTerms.Abbot Suger: The twelfth-century French abbot whose vision for the Abbey Church of Saint-Denis launched the Gothic movement
keyTerms.entasis: The subtle swelling of Greek columns to correct the optical illusion of concavity
keyTerms.labyrinth: A symbolic pilgrimage path set into cathedral floors, allowing the faithful to make a spiritual journey without leaving the church
